_schema.name: string — Company name
_schema.industry: string — e.g., AI/ML, Robotics, Cloud, SaaS
_schema.culture_notes: string — Interview culture, values, what they look for
_schema.pm_structure: string — How PM org is structured (if known)

interview_process.rounds: string — Number and types of rounds
focus_areas: string — What they emphasize: product sense, technical, behavioral, etc.
interview_process.tips: string — Any known tips or preparation advice

leadership_principles: string — Company values or principles (if applicable)

recent_news.headline: string
recent_news.significance: string — Why this matters for your prep

_schema.your_notes: string — Personal notes, connections at the company, application status

_instructions: Add companies you're targeting or interested in. Keep profiles updated with recent news and interview intel. The coach uses this data to tailor practice sessions to specific companies.
